title: Searching for a World that Dont exist
description: This modpack is inspired by Wifies’ “Searching for a World That Doesn’t Exist.” It brings a creepy and mysterious feel to Minecraft, with odd world generation, hidden secrets, and a spooky atmosphere. The goal is to give players the same uneasy feeling of
body:
This modpack is inspired by Wifies’ “Searching for a World That Doesn’t Exist.” It brings a creepy and mysterious atmosphere into Minecraft, with strange world generation, hidden secrets, and unsettling surprises. Players will feel the tension of exploring a world that seems alive, full of puzzles and eerie discoveries.

If you enjoy horror-themed Minecraft or want to experience the unsettling vibe of an ARG-style adventure, this pack is made to capture that feeling.
